reason: D-1 resolved (PO 2026-06-30): version card navigates to Version page room before builder; REQ-VR-001 superseded per HV-1 Step 0 requirement

replacement_node.statement: Version Room — Clicking a version card on the Home page navigates to /version/:id (the Version workspace page), not directly to the Builder. The Version page is a dedicated workspace to review metadata, manage status transitions, view resources, crew, and structure, and launch into the Builder. The Builder is only reachable via the Version page (or direct link).
